name: Syloth
bio: Loyal to Kruxer and one of his most formidable knights, Syloth stood at the entrance to Kruxer's dwelling and put up the fiercest fight the heroes faced on their approach -- ultimately the one to end Baine's life.
In the end, there wasn't much more to Syloth than that: a loyal soldier serving a would-be despot to the last. He met his end at the hands of the mercenary Drexl.
